name: Italian Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. In a screw-top jar, mix the olive oil, water, white vinegar, granulated sugar, fat-free parmesan cheese, oregano, paprika, dry mustard, black pepper, and crushed garlic.
2. Cover the jar tightly with its lid.
3. Shake well to combine all ingredients thoroughly.
4. Store in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.
